overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking steadily along a dirt trail through an arid desert canyon. Large sandstone rock formations flank both sides of the path with sparse desert vegetation including Joshua trees and yucca plants under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail between large rock formations

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the desert trail, moving deeper into the canyon valley

entered.detail: large sandstone rock formation with layered strata rising on the left side of the trail
tall rugged rock outcrop with vertical cliffs on the right side of the canyon
worn dirt path winding through the desert floor with visible footprints and tire tracks
distinctive yucca tree with spiky leaves visible in the distance along the path
scattered low-lying desert vegetation and dry bushes along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through a wide desert canyon, flanked by massive sandstone rock formations on both sides. Sparse desert vegetation including Joshua trees and yucca plants dot the arid landscape under a clear afternoon sky, with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through a wide, arid desert canyon. It begins with the character walking steadily forward, flanked by massive sandstone rock formations that tower over the path. As the camera advances, the landscape reveals sparse desert vegetation, including Joshua trees and yucca plants dotting the dry terrain. The scene then opens up to show a clear afternoon sky, finally extending the view toward distant mountains visible on the horizon.
